intro: Experience the thrill of iFormula League HEAT 1 at the impressive Circuito de Jerez - Ángel Nieto! On Saturday, September 30th at 15:00 UTC, fierce competitors will battle it out in a race to be remembered. Get ready for an epic show of speed and skill as these masterful drivers demonstrate their extraordinary talents! Don't miss your chance to witness history in the making!
